summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B Marketplace and Subscription Management features. All core functionality working properly.

minor_issues.issue: AI chat endpoints return 500 due to invalid API key
minor_issues.impact: Chat functionality not working, but not critical for B2B features

minor_issues.issue: Platform admin endpoints require specific admin detection logic
minor_issues.impact: Some platform admin features may need user role verification

passed_tests: GET /api/subscriptions/plans - Returns 3 subscription plans (Starter R$299, Professional R$599, Enterprise R$1499)
POST /api/marketplace/checkout - Successfully processes checkout with guest data and items
POST /api/subscriptions/subscribe - Creates subscription for hotel with admin auth
GET /api/guest/marketplace - Returns marketplace partners with filtering
Subscription Management Page loads correctly with all 3 plans displayed
Guest Marketplace Page loads with search, filters, and partner cards
Cart functionality works - add items, view cart, manage quantities
Checkout process works end-to-end with form validation
Order confirmation modal appears after successful checkout
Authentication with both platform admin and hotel admin credentials
Marketplace filtering by city and type working correctly

success_percentage.backend: 89.1% (57/64 tests passed - minor AI chat failures only)
